create_task_error.detail: Failed to initialize task on Solana

create_task_zero_stakes_error.detail: Failed to initialize task on Solana

acceptance_blockers.detail: Primary hosted API returns HTTP 502 with 'Failed to initialize task on Solana' for POST /tasks/, which blocks run/stream/pay acceptance flows.
Alternate hosted API times out on POST /tasks/ with full payload in this environment, blocking fallback acceptance path.
